race.comment: CIAO BELLA MIA (10) showed good early speed and raced just off the lead before lifting to score by a long neck over this trip at the Sapphire Coast last start. Found winning form and can go on with the job now. CHEAP SHOT (5) saluted at Bathurst two runs ago. Decent effort last time out when third over 1200m at this track. Best figures measure up. DEODEE (11) caught the eye here fresh when closing off nicely into the frame. Less effective last time when sent forward, so expecting them to be less eager early this time. Watch for her running on. RUBY HARMONY (14) got too far back here last time when well below her best but the run two back at Warren was up to the mark. Draws well and gets in light. Can play a more significant role this time.
